name: Talked to insurance adjuster after forklift crash at work did I mess up?

mainEntity.name: Talked to insurance adjuster after forklift crash at work did I mess up?

acceptedAnswer.text: Limit talks; get lawyer before more statements.[2]
acceptedAnswer.description: **Possibly; statements can be used against you—stop communicating without a lawyer.** Adjusters seek low settlements.[2] Key factors: Request all in writing, don't admit fault or minimize injuries. Lawyer handles future talks.[3] Recorded calls common.

description: Limit talks; get lawyer before more statements.[2]
